name: Matchday Mesh
description: Serverless football watch parties with P2P fan passes, live predictions, QR check-ins, and USDt pool cards.
longDescription: Matchday Mesh lets fans create a local football match hub, issue fan passes, scan check-ins, run a watch-party feed, post predictions, and collect optional USDt pool contributions without a central event server. The first PearBrowser build is focused on Pears Stack proof with a WDK-shaped payment module and a QVAC local coach module gated until local inference is proven.
author: Pear Ecosystem

qvac.note: Enable only after QVAC SDK inference runs locally with no cloud AI API.

wdk.note: The launch build starts with a deterministic demo ledger. Promote to WDK track claim only when the actual WDK adapter path is passing.
